title: Neigh Replay
hero.title: Stream Without Reins
hero.subtitle: Where stories run wild and time flies when you’re having fun
film1.name: Midnight Gallop
film1.desc: A runaway tale that hits the ground running — blink and you’ll miss a beat, because this story doesn’t just unfold, it bolts.
film2.name: Stable Genius
film2.desc: A sharp-witted satire that plays its cards close to the chest — and then flips the table when you least expect it.
film3.name: Rein Check
film3.desc: A twist-filled thriller where nothing holds the reins for long — just when you think you’ve got it figured out, it changes tack.
films.title: Our Films
features.title: Streaming Features
feature1.name: Personalized Recommendations
feature1.desc: We know your taste like the back of our hand — or at least we’re getting there. Sit back and let us do the heavy lifting while you reap the rewards.
feature2.name: Multi-Device Streaming
feature2.desc: Watch anywhere, anytime — whether you’re on the go or glued to the couch, we’ve got all bases covered.
feature3.name: Offline Downloads
feature3.desc: No signal? No problem. Download and watch later — because when push comes to shove, your shows should stick with you.
about.title: About Neigh Replay
about.story: Neigh Replay was built for those who don’t just watch stories — they live them. We believe streaming should be seamless, immersive, and always one step ahead of the curve.
about.mission: Our mission is to bring unforgettable stories to your screen without missing a beat. Whether you’re chasing thrills or winding down, we’re here to keep things rolling.
contact.title: Contact Us
contact.text: Got questions, feedback, or just want to break the ice? We’re all ears — don’t be shy.
contact.name: John Doe
